title: Hip Hop Dance Instructor
description:
Position Overview
The Hip Hop Instructor will lead Tasek Academy’s Dance Lab sessions for children aged 9 years and above, inspiring them to explore movement and self-expression through hip hop. This role focuses on delivering engaging weekly classes while nurturing confidence, teamwork, and creativity. The instructor will collaborate with programme staff on showcases and special projects, contributing to students’ creative and personal development.

Classes are conducted on Saturdays:

● Beginners: 3.30pm to 4.30pm
● Intermediate: 4.30pm to 6.00pm

Key Responsibilities

Session Planning & Instruction:

●       Design and deliver engaging hip hop dance lessons for children aged 9 and above, across beginner and intermediate levels.

●       Teach foundational techniques, choreography, musicality, and freestyle exploration.

●       Adapt instruction to meet diverse learning needs and abilities.

●       Maintain a fun, structured, and safe learning environment.

●       Ensure lesson content aligns with Tasek’s developmental outcomes.

Participant Engagement & Mentorship:

●       Build positive relationships with students through encouragement, consistency, and active engagement.

●       Support students in developing confidence, discipline, teamwork, and self-expression through dance.

●       Encourage growth mindset and perseverance through constructive feedback.

Programme & Event Support:

●       Collaborate with Creative Labs staff on showcases, performances, workshops, and special projects.

●       Support rehearsals and performances as required.

●       Assist with setup and pack-down of music equipment and session materials.

Volunteer Support:

●       Guide and support volunteers assisting during sessions, modelling effective engagement and classroom management strategies.

●       Work closely with Programme staff to ensure smooth session delivery.

Requirements

●       Proven experience teaching hip hop dance to children and/or youth.

●       Strong foundation in hip hop choreography, performance styles, and child-friendly teaching methods.

●     Passion for working with children in creative, supportive environments.

●       Strong classroom management and interpersonal skills.

●       Ability to teach across different skill levels and adapt lessons accordingly.

●     Available to commit to Saturday sessions (3.30pm to 6.00pm).

Work Environment

●     Sessions take place in a dedicated indoor dance studio.

●     Active, high-energy teaching environment involving movement, demonstration, and facilitation.

●     Collaborative team culture that values creativity, mentorship, and flexibility.

This role is ideal for instructors passionate about hip hop and youth development, and who enjoy helping children grow in confidence through dance.

postedCompany.description:
Tasek Academy and Social Services (the “Company”) is a non­profit organization incorporated on 14 December 2014. It is located at 1 Yung Sheng Road, #03­06 Jurong Town Community Club, Singapore 618495.

The mission of the Company is to support and help uplift the beneficiaries, the socially disadvantaged, who include, but are not limited to, ex­inmates, youth at risk, single parents, the needy and disabled and their families. Further, the Company has established the following objectives:­
(a) to develop innovative and/or customised solutions to support, uplift and assist its beneficiaries;
(b) to identify and create meaningful and fulfilling employment and other opportunities for our beneficiaries;
(c) to mentor and train our beneficiaries;
(d) the advancement of learning;
(e) the advancement of community development;
(f) the advancement of arts, heritage and culture;
(g) to provide grants, aid and/or assistance towards and/or in furtherance of any of the objects of the Company;
(h) to aid, assist and give relief in any manner and to any extent to any charitable institution whose object/s are similar to or comparable with the objects of the Company; and
(i) to carry out any other objects that are of a charitable, benevolent or philanthropic nature howsoever defined, as the Company may deem appropriate.
postedCompany.name: TASEK ACADEMY AND SOCIAL SERVICES LIMITED
